name: iota-terminal
description: Terminal-themed personal website: Angular & React frontends, pluggable Go/Rust/TS backends.

scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n react,angular,go,rust,ts -c blue,red,cyan,yellow,green "npm run dev --workspace=react-ui" "npm run dev --workspace=angular-ui" "npm run dev --workspace=backend-go" "npm run dev --workspace=backend-rust" "npm run dev --workspace=backend-ts"
